title: Better Vinurl Recipe
description: Improves the vinurl custom disc recipe to be more straightforward
body:
Changes the vinurl disc recipe from 8 colors of wool to one amethyst shard + any creeper disc drop.

![disc recipe image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/810e5fb7f378efde1a52eca27102ca70a8ae8488.png)
